appflow.flow.s3sourceproperties.CfnAbout: The properties that are applied when Amazon S3 is being used as the flow source.

appflow.flow.s3sourceproperties.BucketNa.Description: The Amazon S3 bucket name where the source files are stored.

appflow.flow.s3sourceproperties.BucketPr.Description: The object key for the Amazon S3 bucket in which the source files are stored.

appflow.flow.s3sourceproperties.S3InputF.Description: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.
